chunk_map.heading: Pick one threat, record the decision (H1 + lede)
Phase 1: Run the threat scan across your mapped surface
Read the threat list, expect more than you'll use
Phase 2: Pick the one threat worth hardening against
Push back on the incident story, land the mitigation
Phase 3: Write the decision as an ADR
Read the ADR, check the voice and the lens
Ask whether the ADR loads into future sessions
Save the map and the STRIDE walk before you clear

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Referent resolution under a sequential deck read.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Considered chunk 3 line 39 "the incident story" (first mention, immediately unpacked one bullet earlier as "the worst realistic case" in the same chunk) and chunk 6 line 75 "the Decision section" (established by the Context/Decision/Consequences/Alternatives-considered template rendered in chunk 5's fenced prompt, lines 65-69, which the reader sees on the prior slide even though fence content is exempt from grading) — both resolve under a sequential read; no fix needed.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every backward reference points at a beat that exists.
Live-demo beats survive a text read.
Internal dialect never lands on a slide.
